name: Guangdong Liantai Environmental Protection Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Liantai Environmental Protection Co.,Ltd. provides environmental products and services in China. The company focuses on the investment and operation of sewage treatment, water purification, sewage pipe network, water body remediation and auxiliary facilities, and wastewater treatment projects. It also designs, constructs, and operates environmental improvement projects. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Shantou, China.
